2311180.name: RoboJesus
2311180.description:
SPEAK TO JESUS

RoboJesus is an AI chatbot that simulates what it would be like to talk to Jesus Christ. What will you ask him?

WARNING

While some people believe that the holy spirit "flows through" this app, we insist that it's not really Jesus in there. Regardless of what it tells you, it's just an AI. Please refrain from worshipping it.

FEATURES

  • Trained on The Holy Bible
  • Full of simulated love
  • Knowledge of modern times
  • Seems to believe it's really Jesus
  • Cutting-edge language model AI
2311180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
